meta.name: PlacedOn lively seed dataset
meta.purpose: Large local fixture for making candidate and employer screens feel populated without editing PlacedOn/frontend.

shape_notes.employer.candidates: Matches EmployerCandidate from frontend/src/app/lib/employerTypes.ts, with dates serialized as ISO strings.
shape_notes.employer.jobs: Matches JobListing from frontend/src/app/lib/jobListingTypes.ts, with dates serialized as ISO strings.
shape_notes.candidate_api: Matches demoApi.ts response shapes for candidate-side screens.
shape_notes.legacy_employer_api: Matches demoApi.ts EmployerResponse for older employer demo API screen.
